category_title: Resistant students who verbalize a dislike for English and complain of boredom
minimal_context: The student is using the VoiceThread online system to read aloud and record simple summarizing sentences during the storytelling session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now it is time to use the VoiceThread system to read aloud and record the simple summarizing sentences.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: This is boring. I don't want to do this.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just look at the screen and give it a try.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks particularly nervous) I am not doing it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to press the record button and read the sentence now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! I would not come if I had to do recording!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Now it is time to use the VoiceThread system to read aloud and record the simple summarizing sentences.

STUDENT: This is boring. I don't want to do this.

TUTOR: Just look at the screen and give it a try.

STUDENT: (Looks particularly nervous) I am not doing it.

TUTOR: You need to press the record button and read the sentence now.

STUDENT: No! I would not come if I had to do recording!

task.content: Reading aloud and recording simple summarizing sentences
task.learning_goal: Review keywords and read aloud simple summarizing sentences

context.environment: Online practicing during the storytelling session
context.materials: VoiceThread online system, audio and visual aids, doodling function with color marker, member icons
context.social_setting: Storyteller with children, peers present who can stay around and hear recordings
context.time_context: Third week of the storytelling cycle

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When children were introduced to the requirement of recording their reading on the VoiceThread system
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Said they would not come if they had to do recording, exhibited behavioral problems, low motivation and poor attitudes
related_quotes: would not come if they had to do recording

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Exhibited behavioral problems, low motivation and poor attitudes, while others were indifferent
